popularStory.headline: Thomas Bliss - Margaret Hulins
popularStory.description: Thomas Bliss was born about 1588 and grew up in an English town torn by religious wars and persecutions. He was a young man when Charles I came to the Throne in 1625 and fled to the American Colonies …

zh.lifeSummary: Thomas Bliss是Thomas Bliss的兒子，於1583年3月20日出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾潘斯維其可。他於1616年4月14日與Margaret Snowe在英國格盧斯特斯爾格盧斯特 聖 約翰 馮 巴普蒂斯特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1631年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德。他去世於1650年2月14日在美國康乃狄克州哈特福德哈特福德享年66歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德哈特福德費爾斯特 邱奇 本 克里斯蒂。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Thomas Bliss是Thomas Bliss的儿子，于1583年3月20日出生在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾潘斯維其可。他于1616年4月14日与Margaret Snowe在英国格盧斯特斯爾格盧斯特 聖 約翰 馮 巴普蒂斯特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1631年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德。他去世于1650年2月14日在美国康涅狄格州哈特福德哈特福德享年66岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德哈特福德費爾斯特 邱奇 本 克里斯蒂。

nameMeanings.name: Bliss
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname for a cheerful person, from Middle English blisse ‘joy’. Compare Blissett .

English (of Norman origin): habitational name from the village of Blay in Calvados, France, recorded in 1077 in the form Bleis. The village of Stoke Bliss in Worcestershire takes the second part of its name from a Norman family de Blez, recorded several times in the county from the 13th century.
German: nickname for a cheerful person, from Middle High German blīde ‘happy, friendly’. It is also found in France.

variants.name: Blish
meanings: English: rare variant of   Bliss  . The surname seems to have died out in Britain.

variants.name: Blissett
meanings: from the Middle English female personal name Blisset or Blissot, apparently a pet form of Middle English bliss ‘gladness, joy’ used as a personal name.
variant of Blessed, from Middle English iblescede ‘blessed, happy, fortunate’. Compare Bleazard .

variants.name: Blitsch
meanings: German: variant of Bliss 3. The surname Blitsch is rare in Germany. Compare Blitch .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: Thomas Bliss was born on 20 March 1583, in Painswick, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Thomas Bliss. He married Margaret Snowe on 14 April 1616, in Gloucester St John the Baptist, Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He lived in Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America in 1631. He died on 14 February 1650, in Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut, United States, at the age of 66, and was buried in First Church of Christ, Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Thomas Bliss est né le 20 mars 1583, à Painswick, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Thomas Bliss. Il a épousé Margaret Snowe le 14 avril 1616, à Gloucester St John the Baptist, Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il a vécu à Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1631. Il est décédé le 14 février 1650, à Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut, États-Unis, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à First Church of Christ, Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Thomas Bliss wurde am 20. März 1583 in Painswick, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Thomas Bliss geboren. Er hat am 14. April 1616 in Gloucester St John the Baptist, Gloucestershire, England Margaret Snowe geheiratet. it.lifeSummary: Thomas Bliss è nato il il 20 marzo 1583 nel Painswick, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Thomas Bliss. Lui sposato Margaret Snowe il 14 aprile 1616, nel Gloucester St John the Baptist, Gloucestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Vissuto a Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America nel 1631. Morì il 14 febbraio 1650, nel Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a First Church of Christ, Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Blissは1583年3月20日にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアペインスウィックでThomas Blissの息子として生まれた。1616年4月14日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアグロウセスター スト ジョン ス バプティストでMargaret Snoweと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1631年にはイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードに住んでいた。彼は1650年2月14日にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ハートフォードハートフォードで66歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードハートフォードフィルスト チャーチ オフ チリストにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Bliss(은)는 1583년 3월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 파인스윅에서 Thomas Bliss의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1616년 4월 14일 영국 그루스스터실르 그루스스터 스트 존 테 바프티스트에서 Margaret Snowe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1631년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드에서 살았다. 그는 1650년 2월 14일 미국 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 하트퍼드에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 하트퍼드 피르스트 처르치 프 크리스트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Thomas Bliss nasceu em 20 de março de 1583, em Painswick, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Thomas Bliss. Ele casou-se com Margaret Snowe em 14 de abril de 1616, em Gloucester St John the Baptist, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele viveu em Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America em 1631. Ele faleceu em 14 de fevereiro de 1650, em Hartford, Hartford, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em First Church of Christ, Hartford, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Thomas Bliss родился 20 марта 1583 г. в местности пеинсвикк, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. Его отца звали Thomas Bliss. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Snowe 14 апреля 1616 г. в местности глоусестир ст джон т баптист, глоусестиршир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он жил в местности хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1631 году. Он умер 14 февраля 1650 г. в местности хартфорд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности фирст чурч оф краист, хартфорд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Thomas Bliss nació el 20 de marzo de 1583, en Painswick, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de Thomas Bliss. Se casó con Margaret Snowe el 14 de abril de 1616, en Gloucester St John the Baptist, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Vivió en Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America en 1631. Murió el 14 de febrero de 1650, en Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en First Church of Christ, Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.
